title: Virginia Thompson
compiled_truth: Virginia Thompson is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-06-24), Virginia Thompson sent 189 and received 293 emails, totalling 482 interactions.
